basic_details.job_title: DHS Madurai Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 82 Medical Officer, Pharmacist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Madurai (DHS Madurai) Recruitment 2026 has been released on the official website madurai.nic.in. A total of 82 vacancies have been announced through the DHS Madurai Recruitment 2026 for Medical Officer, Staff Nurse, ANM, Lab Technician, Pharmacist, Health Inspector, Driver, Account Assistant, and other posts.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, DGNM/B.Sc Nursing, Plus Two with Biology, 8th std, MLT Certificate, +2 with Lab Tech, Diploma/B.Pharm/M.Pharm, ANM Course, M.Sc/B.Sc Nursing with experience, BPT, HSC with HMV License, B.Com with Tally
qualification.details: Medical Officer (UPHC): MBBS Degree awarded by a university or Institution recognised by the UGC. Courses approved by MCI/NMC. Registered in Tamil Nadu Medical Council. Staff Nurse / MLHP (UHWC,UPHC): Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery (DGNM) or B.Sc. Nursing from Institution recognized by Indian Nursing Council. Health Inspector (UHWC): Passed Plus Two with Biology or Botany and Zoology. Passed Tamil in SSLC. Two years Multipurpose Health Worker (M) / Inspector / Sanitary Inspector Course Training from recognized Institution. Multipurpose Hospital Worker (UPHC, UHWC): 8th std Pass (Able to read and write in Tamil) Lab. Technician (UPHC): Passed +2 Examination. Certificate in Medical Lab Technology Course (one year) from institution recognized by Director of Medical Education. Good physique, vision and capacity for outdoor work. Pharmacist (UPHC): Diploma in Pharmacy or Bachelor of Pharmacy or Master of Pharmacy. Registered under Tamil Nadu Pharmacy Council. ANM (UPHC): Passed Higher Secondary School Examination and 2 years Auxiliary Nurse and Midwife/Multi-Purpose Health Worker (Female) Course from approved DPH Institution. Urban Health Manager (UPHC): M.Sc. Nursing (Community Health/Paediatrics/Obstetrics & Gynaecology) or B.Sc. Nursing with minimum 3 years experience in Public Health (compulsory). Physiotherapist (PHC): Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) from any recognised University Driver (UPHC): High School Certificate. Permanent Driving license of Heavy motor vehicle. Account Assistant (CPMU): B.Com. with Tally

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://madurai.nic.in/notice_category/recruitment/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHS Madurai Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DHS Madurai Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DHS Madurai Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Medical Officer (UPHC): MBBS Degree awarded by a university or Institution recognised by the UGC. Courses approved by MCI/NMC. Registered in Tamil Nadu Medical Council. Staff Nurse / MLHP (UHWC,UPHC): Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery (DGNM) or B.Sc. Nursing from Institution recognized by Indian Nursing Council. Health Inspector (UHWC): Passed Plus Two with Biology or Botany and Zoology. Passed Tamil in SSLC. Two years Multipurpose Health Worker (M) / Inspector / Sanitary Inspector Course Training from recognized Institution. Multipurpose Hospital Worker (UPHC, UHWC): 8th std Pass (Able to read and write in Tamil) Lab. Technician (UPHC): Passed +2 Examination. Certificate in Medical Lab Technology Course (one year) from institution recognized by Director of Medical Education. Good physique, vision and capacity for outdoor work. Pharmacist (UPHC): Diploma in Pharmacy or Bachelor of Pharmacy or Master of Pharmacy. Registered under Tamil Nadu Pharmacy Council. ANM (UPHC): Passed Higher Secondary School Examination and 2 years Auxiliary Nurse and Midwife/Multi-Purpose Health Worker (Female) Course from approved DPH Institution. Urban Health Manager (UPHC): M.Sc. Nursing (Community Health/Paediatrics/Obstetrics & Gynaecology) or B.Sc. Nursing with minimum 3 years experience in Public Health (compulsory). Physiotherapist (PHC): Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) from any recognised University Driver (UPHC): High School Certificate. Permanent Driving license of Heavy motor vehicle. Account Assistant (CPMU): B.Com. with Tally

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://madurai.nic.in/notice_category/recruitment/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies released by DHS Madurai?
faq.answer: District Health Society Madurai has released a total of 82 vacancies for various posts under its recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for DHS Madurai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the DHS Madurai Recruitment 2026 is 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for DHS Madurai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for DHS Madurai Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum and maximum qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The qualifications range from 8th standard pass to MBBS, DGNM/B.Sc Nursing, and specialized degrees like B.Pharm/M.Pharm, BPT, and B.Com with Tally.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for DHS Madurai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The salaries for the posts vary from Rs.11,000/- for Multipurpose Hospital Worker to Rs.63,000/- for Medical Officer.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of District Health Society Madurai, which is https://madurai.nic.in/notice_category/recruitment/.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for all the positions under this recruitment is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the District Health Society Madurai, located in Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates.
